overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on a futuristic elevated train in a cyberpunk city. The camera looks out at passing brutalist buildings and a distinctive flag, then pans across the train interior showing passengers with cybernetic enhancements. The train arrives at a station marked 'GLEN SOUTH'. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train car looking out at futuristic commercial district

events.description: train passes a large building facade featuring a Puerto Rican style flag mural
camera begins turning from exterior window view toward train interior

agents.ego_description: sitting on a train seat looking out the window at the passing cityscape and buildings

entered.detail: tall concrete building with vertical slit windows and industrial aesthetic
large mural of a flag with single star and stripes in black, white, and red colors
metal and glass window frame of the elevated train car
digital display showing the number 08 on the station infrastructure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from an elevated train passing through a futuristic city. Brutalist concrete buildings pass by outside the window, including a distinctive building featuring a large Puerto Rican-style flag mural. The train moves steadily through the commercial district as the camera begins to turn away from the window toward the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic train car interior with green neon lighting

events.description: camera turns completely from exterior view to interior of train car
interior illuminated by green neon lights as train enters a shaded section

agents.ego_description: panning across the train interior to observe other passengers and the cyberpunk aesthetic

notable_agents.action: passenger with white spiky cybernetic hair implants looking at a tablet device
passenger standing and holding onto a yellow support pole

entered.detail: passenger with distinctive white spiked cybernetic implants on head using a tablet
green upholstered bench seat with worn texture
digital display showing glowing green text and advertisements
vertical yellow pole for standing passengers to hold

segments.scene_description: The camera turns to reveal the train interior, bathed in green neon light. A passenger with striking white spiky cybernetic hair sits nearby focused on a tablet. Other passengers are seated or standing throughout the car. The environment features green upholstered benches, yellow support poles, and glowing digital advertisements overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: train interior with bright sunlight streaming through windows

events.description: bright sunlight streams through train windows illuminating the interior
camera pans across the train car showing passengers on both sides

agents.ego_description: looking around the train car at various passengers while moving through a sunlit section of track

notable_agents.action: passenger in camouflage pants sitting with hands clasped looking down
passenger with bright red hair sitting near the train door

entered.detail: glass sliding door between train cars with metal frame
LED display showing train route information in green text

segments.scene_description: The train passes through a sunlit section, with bright light streaming through the windows and mixing with the green interior lighting. The camera pans across the car showing various passengers including a person in camo pants and another with red hair. The glass doors between train cars and digital route displays are visible as the train continues moving.

scene_state.functional_zone: train arriving at Glen South station platform

events.description: camera returns to focus on the cybernetic passenger with spiky white hair
train arrives at Glen South station platform and begins to stop

agents.ego_description: focusing on the cybernetic passenger before looking out at the arriving station platform

notable_agents.action: cybernetic passenger continues looking at tablet device as train arrives at station

entered.detail: train station platform with yellow safety line and concrete surface
red neon sign reading 'GLEN SOUTH' on the station wall

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the passenger with white spiky cybernetic hair, who remains focused on their tablet. Sunlight illuminates the interior as the train approaches its destination. Finally, the train arrives at Glen South station, with the red neon station sign visible through the window as the train comes to a stop at the platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a view of a brutalist cityscape into the neon-lit interior of a futuristic train before arriving at a station. It begins by looking out the window at concrete buildings and a large Puerto Rican-style flag mural as the train glides through a commercial district. As the camera turns away from the window, the scene shifts to the interior car bathed in green neon light, revealing passengers with cybernetic enhancements and glowing digital advertisements. The lighting then transforms as the train passes through a sunlit section, mixing bright natural light with the green interior glow while the camera pans across various passengers and digital route displays. Finally, the camera returns to a passenger with white spiky hair before the train slows to a stop at Glen South station, marked by a red neon sign visible through the glass.
